# DO NOT EDIT THIS FOLDER

This is a backup of the raw scraped data from 2026-05-01.

All data in this folder was extracted from:
- NSW Government website (2017-2025 data)
- Board of Studies Archive (2001-2016 data)

Data formats vary between sources and years. See `docs/data-collection-checklist.md` for details.

If you need to modify data, copy files to `data/csv/` and edit there.
